hero.title: London School
hero.description: London School is an education center that helps students build strong language and technology skills.

aboutIntro.title: Building futures since 2019
aboutIntro.mission: We help children, teenagers and adults gain strong language and technology skills — with interactive methods, international standards and a community that celebrates every success.

programs.title: Choose Your Learning
programs.description: Three comprehensive programs designed to help you grow in languages and technology.

english.title: English Language
english.description: From beginner levels to advanced academic and professional English.

features.kids: Courses for kids, teens and adults
features.communication: Strong focus on communication and real-life use
features.academic: Academic writing and skills for work

german.title: German Language
german.description: Learn German for study, work or everyday life.

features.exams: Preparation for official exams (Goethe, TestDaF, ÖSD)

programming.title: Programming
programming.description: Your first step into the digital world and future careers.

features.allAges: Courses for kids, teens and adults

partnership.title: Powered by Logiscool
partnership.description: Our programming courses for kids use Blox code technology, making learning fun through game development and AI projects.

activities.title: Learning beyond the classroom
activities.pageDescription: Camps, competitions, festivals and trips — the experiences that make London School more than a school.

summerCamp.title: Summer Camp
summerCamp.tagline: Education, creativity, technology and fun — six summers running.
summerCamp.description: Our Summer Camp brings education, creativity, technology and fun together for the sixth consecutive year. Every summer, students spend unforgettable weeks learning languages, coding, playing and making new friends.
summerCamp.point2: Outdoor games, sports and team challenges
summerCamp.point3: Open to kids, juniors and teens

bakeAndSale.title: Bake & Sale
bakeAndSale.tagline: Students bake, sell and give back to the community.
bakeAndSale.description: Bake & Sale is one of our favourite community traditions: students plan, bake and sell their own treats, learning teamwork, budgeting and responsibility while supporting good causes.

spellingBee.title: Spelling Bee
spellingBee.description: The Spelling Bee challenges students to spell their way to the top. It builds vocabulary, confidence on stage and a healthy taste for friendly competition.
spellingBee.point2: Builds confidence in front of an audience

speedTyping.title: Speed Typing
speedTyping.description: Our Speed Typing competition turns keyboard skills into a sport. Students race the clock — accuracy first, speed second — and leave with a skill they will use for life.
speedTyping.point1: Practical digital skills for school and work
speedTyping.point2: Accuracy and focus under time pressure

quizzes.title: Quizzes
quizzes.description: Our quiz nights put teams head-to-head on languages, science, culture and technology. Fast, loud and surprisingly educational.
quizzes.point2: Questions across languages, culture and tech
quizzes.point3: Open to all levels and ages

techFest.title: Tech Fest
techFest.tagline: The first technology festival in Mitrovica — 1,000+ visitors.

trips.title: Educational Trips
trips.tagline: From Rome and Vienna to the wave camp at Jale.
trips.description: Learning continues far beyond the classroom. From European capitals to the Albanian Riviera, every trip becomes an experience our students never forget.

rome.title: Rome, Italy
rome.description: A journey through ancient history, art and culture in the Eternal City.

vienna.title: Vienna, Austria
vienna.description: Exploring imperial palaces, museums and the German language in real life.

jale.title: Jale Wave Camp
jale.description: The first school in Kosovo to bring students to Wave Camp in Jale — sun, sea and team spirit.

zoo.title: Zoo Day
zoo.description: A fun local outing where younger students learn about animals up close.

cinema.title: Cinema Trips
cinema.description: Movie days that turn film into language practice and shared fun.

training.title: Training & Participation
training.description: Our students and teachers show up wherever learning happens — fairs, festivals and training programs across Kosovo.

ibcmFair.title: IBCM Fair
ibcmFair.description: Presenting London School and connecting with students at the IBCM education fair.

kosict.title: KosICT
kosict.description: Attending Kosovo's biggest technology conference to stay ahead of the digital curve.

youthEmpowerment.title: Youth Empowerment
youthEmpowerment.description: Workshops and programs that build leadership and life skills for young people.

aabFair.title: AAB Fair
aabFair.description: Joining AAB College's fair to explore opportunities in higher education.

techFest.label: Tech Fest
techFest.eyebrow: First ever technology festival in Mitrovica
techFest.title: Where Mitrovica meets the future
techFest.description: In 2025, London School organized the first technology festival Mitrovica had ever seen — a full day of talks, workshops, robots, games and ideas that brought the whole city together.
techFest.quote: It didn't feel like a school event — it felt like the future arriving in our city.

about.title: Shaping the Future
about.description: London School is your local center for foreign languages and technology education for children, teenagers and adults.

history.title: Our Story
history.subtitle: The journey of London School from 2019 until today

2019.title: The Beginning
2019.description: London School started as a small language center in Mitrovica, founded by English teacher Albina Hoti to bring high-quality language education to local youth.

2021.title: Growth & Expansion
2021.description: With a fast-growing number of students, we expanded our curriculum with English, German and our first steps in technology. We introduced small group classes and learning through practical activities.

2024.title: Logiscool Partnership
2024.description: Seeing the importance of technology education, we partnered with the international Logiscool school to bring international certification in innovative programming courses: Python, JavaScript and Blox, further enriching our academic offer.

today.title: A Growing Community
today.description: Today, London School welcomes hundreds of students every year, with dedicated teachers and a modern campus in Mitrovica – a space built for interactive and creative learning.

whatWeOffer.title: What London School Offers
whatWeOffer.description: Interactive methods, experienced teachers and programs designed according to international standards. Our mission is to help students gain confidence, practical skills and real opportunities for the future.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To empower students with the language and technical skills they need to succeed in a digital, global world, while encouraging creativity, critical thinking and cultural awareness.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: The principles that guide everything we do

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We aim for the highest standards in teaching and student achievement.

passion.title: Passion
passion.description: Our educators are passionate about inspiring and supporting learners.

global.title: Global Perspective
global.description: Preparing students to succeed in a connected world.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Embracing modern teaching methods and technology.

impact.title: Our Impact
impact.description: Numbers that reflect our dedication to quality
impact.successRateDesc: In TOEFL and other certification exams

team.spotlightTitle: Our instructors are at the heart of our programs

founder.name: Albina Hoti
founder.bio: Albina Hoti is the founder of London School and an educator with a PhD in English. A former lecturer and assistant at the University of Prishtina, she founded London School and opened the first Logiscool center in Mitrovica, advancing language learning, coding and literacy.
founder.education: PhD in English Language and Literature, University of Prishtina
founder.achievements: Built partnerships with Logiscool • Trained 500+ students • Expert TOEFL instructor

testimonials.title: What Our Students
testimonials.description: Hear the experiences of our London School families.

agron.name: Agron K.
agron.quote: My child has made incredible progress in English thanks to London School. The teachers are true professionals and deeply committed.

valdete.name: Valdete M.
valdete.quote: I passed the Goethe B2 exam on my first try! The teaching method is very effective and interactive.

luan.name: Luan B.
luan.quote: My son took the programming course and now creates his own games. The Logiscool partnership is fantastic!

besarta.name: Besarta S.
besarta.quote: I scored 105 on the TOEFL and got accepted to the university of my dreams. Thank you, London School!

arben.name: Arben D.
arben.quote: My daughter earned a scholarship thanks to her success in a competition. I'm so proud of London School's support.

mirela.name: Mirela H.
mirela.quote: I got hired as a developer after the programming course. The training was practical and focused on the industry.

success.title: What Our Students Say
